# neon_branch_schema (Data Source)

Retrieves the schema for a Neon branch database in SQL format.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_branch_schema" "example" {
  project_id    = "your-project-id"
  branch_id     = "your-branch-id"
  database_name = "neondb"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `database_name` (String) The name of the database for which the schema is retrieved.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `sql` (String) The database schema in SQL format.
